designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style
The brand personality is "Modern Editorial / Sunset Dusk," positioning the service not as a utility, but as a premium ritual for the discerning vehicle owner. The design system evokes the feeling of "the golden hour"—the moment when light transforms ordinary objects into something extraordinary. 

The aesthetic blends **Modernism** with **Glassmorphism**. It utilizes heavy whitespace to provide a sense of luxury, high-contrast typography for an editorial edge, and translucent, glowing layers that mimic the light-leak effects of a sunset. The emotional response is one of calm, sophistication, and meticulous care.

## Layout & Spacing
The layout philosophy is a **Fluid Grid** with intentional **Asymmetry**. This is not a standard bootstrap layout; it is an editorial composition.

- **Grid:** Use a 12-column grid for desktop. Elements should frequently break the grid or be offset (e.g., an image spanning 7 columns with a text block spanning 4 columns, slightly overlapping or staggered).
- **Hero Sections:** Always 100vh. Content should be anchored to the bottom-left to allow the "sunset" imagery to dominate the visual field.
- **Rhythm:** Use large vertical gaps (`section-gap`) to allow the design to breathe, emphasizing the premium nature of the brand.

## Elevation & Depth
Depth is achieved through **Light Leaks** and **Glassmorphism** rather than traditional drop shadows.

- **Surface Tiers:** Background elements use a deep indigo. Cards and overlays use a slightly lighter indigo with a subtle 20px backdrop blur (Glassmorphism).
- **Light Leaks:** Use soft, radial gradients of Amber-Orange (`#FF8C42`) at 10-15% opacity behind key components to simulate the glow of the sun hitting a surface.
- **Borders:** Instead of shadows, use 1px inner borders with a 10% Cream (`#FFF9F2`) opacity to define the edges of floating elements.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons are solid Amber-Orange with Deep Indigo text. Secondary buttons are "Ghost" style with a Cream border that glows on hover using a soft outer glow (0px 0px 15px primary color).
- **Cards:** Glassmorphic with a 1px top-left highlight border to catch the "light." Content inside is center-aligned for service tiers.
- **Inputs:** Dark indigo backgrounds with a bottom-only border in Cream. On focus, the border transitions to the primary Amber gradient.
- **Service Chips:** Small, pill-shaped outlines with high-tracking uppercase text.
- **Immersive Sections:** Use "Parallax" backgrounds with high-resolution imagery of water beads and sunset reflections to create a sense of tactile luxury.

  section-gap: 160px
---

## Brand & Style
The brand personality is "Modern Editorial / Sunset Dusk," positioning the service not as a utility, but as a premium ritual for the discerning vehicle owner. The design system evokes the feeling of "the golden hour"—the moment when light transforms ordinary objects into something extraordinary. 

The aesthetic blends **Modernism** with **Glassmorphism**. It utilizes heavy whitespace to provide a sense of luxury, high-contrast typography for an editorial edge, and translucent, glowing layers that mimic the light-leak effects of a sunset. The emotional response is one of calm, sophistication, and meticulous care.

## Colors
The palette abandons the generic blue/white industry tropes in favor of a sophisticated "Twilight" scheme.

- **Primary (Amber-Orange):** Represents the setting sun. Used for calls to action, highlights, and critical path elements.
- **Secondary (Deep Indigo):** The base of the UI, representing the evening sky. It provides a rich, low-light canvas that makes the primary color pop.
- **Tertiary (Soft Cream):** Replaces pure white for all typography and surface accents to maintain a warm, premium feel.
- **Background:** A deeper indigo-black is used for the base background to ensure maximum depth and contrast.

## Typography
The typography strategy relies on the tension between a high-character, editorial serif and a wide, stable sans-serif.

- **Headlines:** Use **Playfair Display**. It should be set with tight tracking for large display roles. Use it for storytelling and luxury service tiers.
- **Body & UI:** Use **DM Sans**. Its wide apertures and geometric construction ensure legibility against dark backgrounds. 
- **Labels:** Small labels and navigation elements should be set in all-caps DM Sans with increased letter spacing to enhance the premium, "boutique" feel.

## Layout & Spacing
The layout philosophy is a **Fluid Grid** with intentional **Asymmetry**. This is not a standard bootstrap layout; it is an editorial composition.

- **Grid:** Use a 12-column grid for desktop. Elements should frequently break the grid or be offset (e.g., an image spanning 7 columns with a text block spanning 4 columns, slightly overlapping or staggered).
- **Hero Sections:** Always 100vh. Content should be anchored to the bottom-left to allow the "sunset" imagery to dominate the visual field.
- **Rhythm:** Use large vertical gaps (`section-gap`) to allow the design to breathe, emphasizing the premium nature of the brand.

## Elevation & Depth
Depth is achieved through **Light Leaks** and **Glassmorphism** rather than traditional drop shadows.

- **Surface Tiers:** Background elements use a deep indigo. Cards and overlays use a slightly lighter indigo with a subtle 20px backdrop blur (Glassmorphism).
- **Light Leaks:** Use soft, radial gradients of Amber-Orange (`#FF8C42`) at 10-15% opacity behind key components to simulate the glow of the sun hitting a surface.
- **Borders:** Instead of shadows, use 1px inner borders with a 10% Cream (`#FFF9F2`) opacity to define the edges of floating elements.

## Shapes
Shapes are "Softly Rounded." This mimics the aerodynamic curves of a high-end vehicle and the soft diffusion of light.

- **Standard Elements:** Use a 0.5rem (8px) radius for buttons and input fields.
- **Large Components:** Cards and immersive sections use a 1.5rem (24px) radius.
- **Imagery:** Photos should have large radii or, occasionally, organic "blob" masks to reinforce the fluid, liquid nature of a car wash.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons are solid Amber-Orange with Deep Indigo text. Secondary buttons are "Ghost" style with a Cream border that glows on hover using a soft outer glow (0px 0px 15px primary color).
- **Cards:** Glassmorphic with a 1px top-left highlight border to catch the "light." Content inside is center-aligned for service tiers.
- **Inputs:** Dark indigo backgrounds with a bottom-only border in Cream. On focus, the border transitions to the primary Amber gradient.
- **Service Chips:** Small, pill-shaped outlines with high-tracking uppercase text.
- **Immersive Sections:** Use "Parallax" backgrounds with high-resolution imagery of water beads and sunset reflections to create a sense of tactile luxury.

screens.name: projects/11316344821476612518/screens/1751d32610da4caa8b25aae77b5fc2e0
screens.prompt:
A premium, production-ready desktop landing page for Sunset Car Wash. Use the 'Twilight Horizon' theme with a deep indigo base (#1b110c) and warm amber/sunset orange accents (#ff8c42). Layout & Sections: 1. Header: TopNavBar with phone (417) 555-0199 and brand logo 'SUNSET'. 2. Hero: Immersive full-width section with high-contrast serif headlines ("THE ART OF THE SHINE") using {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}. 3. #credibility: Narrative section about 'Local Craftsmanship' and 'Master Detailer Excellence' featuring stats (20+ years, 10k+ finishes) and {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_5}}. 4. Services: 'Select Your Level of Care' with three tiers: 'The Signature Wash' ($45), 'The Horizon Detail' ($185), and 'Ceramic Shield' (Quote Basis). Use a sophisticated grid with macro detailing photography. 5. About: 'Meet the Hands Behind the Shine' featuring a portrait of Lance and his team ({{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}}), emphasizing certified master detailers and eco-conscious methods. 6. #visit: 'Visit the Studio' section with location details (1605 Selma Road, Springfield, OH 45505) and a map slot:
. 7. Contact: 'Request an Appointment' custom form with fields for name, email, vehicle type, service selection, and notes. 8. Footer: Complete with navigation links, contact info (265.663 7265, lance5177@yahoo.com), and copyright. Technical Requirements: - Use Playfair Display for high-contrast serif headlines. - Implement smooth scrolling and a fixed navigation bar. - Use CSS custom properties for the distinctive color palette. - Ensure semantic HTML, responsive structure, and no lorem ipsum. - Add subtle hover effects and transitions to reinforce the high-end feel.

screens.title: Sunset Car Wash | Premium Detailing Homepage

outputComponents.text:
I have completed the production-ready desktop landing page for **Sunset Car Wash**, fully implementing the **Twilight Horizon** design system to establish a premium, editorial brand identity.

### Design Implementation:
- **Cinematic Visuals:** The layout centers around high-fidelity imagery, including the architectural hero shot of the facility at golden hour and macro detailing photography to emphasize craftsmanship.
- **Editorial Typography:** I've utilized high-contrast serif headlines to create a sophisticated, magazine-like feel that conveys immediate quality and authority.
- **Bespoke Narrative Flow:** The page moves from a high-impact hero section into a narrative of "Master Detailer Excellence," using asymmetrical layouts and large-scale photography instead of generic grids.
- **Conversion-Optimized Sections:**
    - **Service Tiers:** Three distinct packages with clear pricing and value propositions.
    - **Studio Visit:** A dedicated section with precise location data and a functional map slot.
    - **Appointment Request:** A custom, validation-ready form designed for high-end lead capture.
- **Technical Foundation:** Built with semantic HTML, modern CSS (using custom properties for the amber/indigo palette), and smooth-scroll interactivity for a seamless user experience.

The site is now ready for review and further refinement.

outputComponents.suggestion: Switch to a mobile version of this landing page
Add a section for customer testimonials and reviews
Apply a lighter, "Morning Dew" version of the theme
